丢弃该跟踪\",\"labelName\":\"max_age\",\"name\":\"max_age\",\"nameCN\":\"最大匹配帧数\",\"namespace\":\"hybirdsort\",\"range\":\"1,60\",\"step\":1,\"type\":\"int\"},{\"default\":0.25,\"description\":\"匹配过程中iou门限,小于该门限,则匹配失败\",\"labelName\":\"iou_thres\",\"name\":\"iou_thres\",\"nameCN\":\"iou阈值\",\"namespace\":\"hybirdsort\",\"range\":\"0,1\",\"step\":0.01,\"type\":\"float\"},{\"default\":2,\"description\":\"持续多少帧检测到,
